name: Jimmy Carr
oneLine: British-Irish stand-up comic and TV host known for clipped one-liners and dark humour.
bio: Jimmy Carr is a British-Irish comedian, writer and television host known for his dry delivery, distinctive laugh, and tightly written one-liner style with a focus on taboo topics. He hosts the long-running panel show 8 Out of 10 Cats and its spin-off 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown on Channel 4, and was the first British comic to release a Netflix stand-up special with Funny Business. He has released numerous DVD specials including Comedian (2007), Making People Laugh (2010) and Laughing and Joking (2013), and the Netflix special His Dark Material (2021).
style: Tightly written one-liner stand-up plus panel TV
notable: The Big Fat Quiz of the Year
